name: Palo Alto Networks, Inc.
description: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. is a global cybersecurity leader that provides advanced security solutions to thousands of enterprise, government, and service provider customers. The company's platform-based approach integrates network security, cloud security, and security operations, leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning to detect and prevent sophisticated cyber threats. Its core offerings include Next-Generation Firewalls, Prisma Cloud for cloud-native security, and Cortex for automated security operations. By delivering a comprehensive and integrated security ecosystem, Palo Alto Networks enables organizations to protect their digital assets across diverse environments in an increasingly complex threat landscape.
